Last 12 months — Value Creation - CRM Growth Engine

The Growth Enabler

2-Way Marketing — Marketing x Customer Service Integration

Two Way Marketing
▼

Bailey is the conversion layer that makes every other CRM channel perform. Without it, campaigns generate interest but not bookings.

Every email and SMS in our CRM is two-way — customers reply directly, a CS specialist picks it up, and the booking gets completed. This single integration is what turns the CRM growth engine from a broadcast system into a revenue-generating conversion machine.

1,085

Confirmed bookings
8 months live

304

Tracked CS
reservations

~1.6k

Projected bookings
annually

Integrating Marketing & Customer Service to push engagements through conversion

Marketing built to move customers down the funnel by removing friction & meeting customers where they want to book. Every Email/SMS encourages replies with a human waiting on the other end.

→ Eliminates "do not reply" across all CRM communications portfolio-wide
→ CS agents handle replies and complete bookings across all 3 booking platforms
→ Removes online portal confusion for new customers
→ Reduces call volume & missed calls — lets our Center staff do what they do best instead
→ New Customer conversion machine. Acts as safety net for website leads.

MoeGo super user — pulling $ value out of POS system investment.

Removing friction, driving advanced usage, improving lead conversion.

Qualitative ▼

Served as the Portfolio's MoeGo expert across the portfolio — driving adoption, resolving center-level issues, and pushing the product team to improve the platform itself.

  • Fixed and improved Review Booster feature — increased Google review volume across brands
  • Removed online booking friction — continuously improved the booking flow to reduce drop-off
  • Improved lead conversion through tour booking process
  • Drove proper SMS feature usage across the portfolio — mass send, templates, upsells
  • Improved safety and legal compliance through vaccination update workflows
  • Pushed MoeGo dev team directly for UI improvements that benefited all users
  • Led POS education via webinars, resources, and office hours
  • Resolved ad hoc center-level issues that would otherwise go unresolved
Structural Unlock

CRM Program — #1 Revenue Growth Opportunity in 2026

The highest-return investment in the portfolio. Dedicated headcount unlocks full execution.

▼

CRM generated $5.4M in its first 12 months — the majority of that time was spent building and optimizing the system. With the foundation now in place, CRM is the #1 revenue opportunity in the portfolio for 2026. Capitalizing on it at full potential requires dedicated execution ownership.

  • Targeted cross-sell promotions & automations — more Super Users, increase avg spend per customer
  • Expanding New & Lapsed Customer Workflows at scale
  • Going hard into Lead Gen as a new acquisition channel

Investment Case

New Hire: CRM Marketing Specialist

Dedicated owner absorbs full CRM execution. Tucker transitions cleanly. CRM growth continues. B2B starts.

New Hire Detail

ItemDetail
RoleCRM Marketing Specialist
Salary range$50k – $75k
Reports toHead of Business Development (Tucker)
CRM revenue they steward (Year 1)$9.8M CRM campaign target
Cost-to-revenue ratio< 1% of the revenue they're responsible for
StatusHeadcount approved. Needs formal HR submission.

Responsibilities transferred from Tucker to specialist:

  • Seasonal mass campaign design and execution — email, SMS, promotional (30% of role)
  • Targeted segment cross-sell promotional campaigns (15% of role)
  • CRM automation content: lifecycle journeys, logic checks, ongoing maintenance (15% of role)
  • Ad hoc CRM campaigns for time-sensitive, one-off sends (5% of role)
  • Data and audience management: segmentation, tagging, property documentation (5% of role)
  • Optimization and A/B testing: automation timing, CTAs, AI integration (5% of role)
  • Two-way marketing coordination with Bailey team: promo logic, CS templates (10% of role)
  • CRM analytics and campaign recaps: quarterly reviews, post-campaign analysis (10% of role)
Next 12 Months

B2B & BDEV Role — #1 Opportunity for Sustainable Growth

Building diversified customer acquisition channels that protect the business from market dependency.

$14M target ▼

CRM drives revenue from the existing customer base — but sustainable, long-term growth requires building new acquisition channels that don't depend on retaining the same pool of customers. B2B partnerships and BDEV strategy are the single biggest lever for growing the business in a way that's durable through market shifts: new customer sources, diversified revenue streams, and acquisition channels the business has never systematically operated. CRM oversight shifts to non-executional strategy as execution is fully owned by the CRM Specialist.

B2B portfolio-wide partnership strategy

Playbook scaled across ALL Centers

3+ revenue-generating partnerships per brand (confirmed MoM). DM & CM level execution. Top 5 partnerships: $1M+ combined annually.

CRM revenue oversight (non-executional)

Built to execute day one.

B2B Partnerships — Custom Playbook & CRM

Expand for Demo ▼

One tool. Zero learning curve. Immediate execution.

Every center gets a pre-loaded partnership system ready to deploy — CMs open it and start working qualified leads with proven playbooks. No setup, no training, no reinventing the wheel. Speed and consistency without the ramp-up.

Click to open demo →

Pre-Loaded Lead Database

Qualified prospects ready to contact — vets, apartments, trainers, groomers. Scored and prioritized so CMs focus time on highest-value opportunities.

Smart Lead Scoring

Built-in qualification metrics flag best-fit partners automatically. CMs know who to meet first and why they're worth the outreach.

Pipeline Tracking & Meeting Logs

Track every relationship from cold outreach to active partnership. Log meetings, document commitments, never lose momentum.

Partner-Specific Playbooks

Step-by-step outreach guides built from top CM feedback. Tailored by partner type — what to say, when to follow up, how to close.

The Growth Accelerator

The AI Advantage — Doing More with Less

Claude Code - AI ▼

1 person. AI-scale execution. What used to take a whole team and a big budget.

Every deliverable in Pillar 2 is built and executed with Claude and AI tooling — compressing timelines, eliminating headcount dependency, and enabling a level of output that wouldn't be possible otherwise. Speed, scale, and cost efficiency in one role.

B2B Playbooks

AI-built partner playbooks scaled across every center — no agency, no extra headcount.

Lead CRMs

Custom CRM tools and lead trackers built and deployed at speed — tailored per brand or market.

Ongoing CRM evolution — new automations, smarter segmentation, and campaign improvements without added cost.

The ask

Three things needed to move forward

Promotion verbally agreed. Equity is the primary conversation.

▼

The promotion and direction have been aligned on. What's needed now is formal confirmation on all three items so execution can begin without ambiguity.

Ask 1 — Title + promotion

Head of Business Development, effective immediately

Verbally agreed. Needs formal HR documentation. Path to Director of Business Development tied to 12-month milestones above.

Ask 2 — CRM specialist hire

Formal HR submission for approved headcount

Headcount is approved. This is a logistics step — but it's on the critical path. The B2B transition cannot begin in earnest until this hire is in process.

Ask 3 — Equity (primary ask)

Equity grant at signing + performance-based equity tied to milestones

1. Equity Grant for Value Already Created

  • Equity grant recognizing proven enterprise value delivered in 2025
  • Portion vested immediately to reflect de-risked execution
  • Acknowledges systems and revenue already built

2. Equity Incentive Plan for Value Being Created (1 year+)

  • Additional performance-based equity tied to revenue growth & portfolio expansion
  • Structured around measurable enterprise value milestones
  • Aligns long-term incentives with company valuation growth
